历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 11163 → 9853 → 19992 → 13559 → 11138, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to a sharp drop in the provincial control line (463 points), there was an outlier with the ranking shifting to 19992. In 2024–2025, it returned to the 11000–13500 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11138, an increase of about 2400 places compared to 2024. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Jilin Province was 109 in 2021, 105 in 2022, 107 in 2023, 102 in 2024, and 111 in 2025. The plan for 2026 is 125, an increase of 14 students (approximately 12.6%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 53rd in 2021 → 51st in 2022 → 46th in 2023 → 50th in 2024 → 50th in 2025 → 44th in 2026, showing a continuous rise in ranking, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a collapse in admission scores across multiple provinces. In 2026, the reputation evaluation remains somewhat negative but to a lesser extent, mainly involving issues related to university management and campus safety. It ranks 8th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and considerable attention from applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Zheng.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Computer Science are highly recommended, Clinical Medicine is recommended, and Law is differentiated and under observation. The university's enrollment in Jilin Province includes majors like Electronic Information, Automation, and Clinical Medicine, which align well with popular directions, making them attractive to candidates. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is approximately 79,968, a slight decrease of about 0.56% from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, not a local university in the province, so it has no regional enrollment preference advantage in Jilin. The university's enrollment in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 1%-2%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 11138, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 12.6% (leading to a larger ranking number), the rise in Soft Science ranking (increasing attractiveness), and the slight decrease in physics category candidates (slightly easing competition), the expansion is the main driving force. Combined with increased competition due to the ranking rise, a slight upward adjustment to 12001 is made. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12001, with a range of 11501–12501.
